commit_message:
[pwrmgr,dv] v2s sign off

Signed-off-by: Jaedon Kim <jdonjdon@google.com>
pull_body:
complete [jaedon] action items from https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan/issues/12075#issue-1202200812

Signed-off-by: Jaedon Kim <jdonjdon@google.com>
Issue Body: From PR (https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan/pull/12758)  cmd:  ./util/dvsim/dvsim.py ./hw/ip/pwrmgr/dv/pwrmgr_sim_cfg.hjson -i pwrmgr_sec_cm_lc_ctrl_intersig_mubi -s 1932707886 --waves -r 1  If esc_rst_tx_i comes less than 2 cycles of slow_clock,  our dut.u_cdc will miss esc_rst_req pass to slow clock domain  and reset signal is lost.    ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/99843637/171487156-923975e4-9cd4-4aab-b3a8-2825a2e2eb35.png)
Comments: jeoongp: esc_req is generated from alert_handler as a pulse in the fast clock domain.  two flop synchronizer is supposed to work in slow-to-fast CDC.   Thanks @jdonjdon. tjaychen: @jdonjdon can you have a look to see if the fix introduced fixes the problem?  if yes we can close this issue down.  jdonjdon: Issue closed with  rtl update (#12988)  tb update (#12758)
